query:
-- Add sample questions for "Respond to a Situation" task
INSERT INTO questions (section, taskType, difficulty, title, prompt, content, timeLimit, preparationTime, createdAt) VALUES
('speaking', 'respond_to_situation', 'easy', 'Respond to Situation: Late Delivery', 'You will hear a situation. You have 30 seconds to respond.', 'Your online order was supposed to arrive yesterday, but it has not arrived yet. You call the customer service to inquire about your package. The representative answers your call.', 30, 0, NOW()),
('speaking', 'respond_to_situation', 'medium', 'Respond to Situation: Meeting Reschedule', 'You will hear a situation. You have 30 seconds to respond.', 'You were scheduled to have an important meeting with your manager at 2 PM today, but she just informed you that she needs to reschedule it. You respond to her request.', 30, 0, NOW()),
('speaking', 'respond_to_situation', 'hard', 'Respond to Situation: Project Feedback', 'You will hear a situation. You have 30 seconds to respond.', 'Your team leader just gave you critical feedback on your project proposal during a team meeting. You need to respond professionally and constructively.', 30, 0, NOW());

-- Add sample questions for "Summarize Group Discussion" task
INSERT INTO questions (section, taskType, difficulty, title, prompt, content, audioUrl, timeLimit, preparationTime, createdAt) VALUES
('speaking', 'summarize_group_discussion', 'easy', 'Summarize Group Discussion: Team Meeting', 'You will hear a group discussion. You have 40 seconds to summarize the key points.', 'A team discussion about implementing new project management software', 'https://example.com/audio/discussion1.mp3', 40, 10, NOW()),
('speaking', 'summarize_group_discussion', 'medium', 'Summarize Group Discussion: Climate Change', 'You will hear a group discussion. You have 40 seconds to summarize the key points.', 'A discussion between experts about climate change mitigation strategies', 'https://example.com/audio/discussion2.mp3', 40, 10, NOW()),
('speaking', 'summarize_group_discussion', 'hard', 'Summarize Group Discussion: Remote Work Policy', 'You will hear a group discussion. You have 40 seconds to summarize the key points.', 'A corporate discussion about implementing a hybrid remote work policy', 'https://example.com/audio/discussion3.mp3', 40, 10, NOW());
